markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy to boost Text-to-Speech (TTS) growth.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Focus: TTS Growth.** TTS organic traffic (\~200 clicks/wk) lags STT (\~1k clicks/wk), prompting a strategic pivot to developer-focused content on topics like TTS evaluation, latency, and integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**January Performance Strong.** Content-driven sessions grew to 2,500, with competitive content (e.g., "11 Labs Alternative") and the "Voice AI" cluster driving the most traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [**Critical Site Error.** A recent site migration created 410 errors for high-traffic pages (e.g., LensGo, \~400 clicks/day), causing significant traffic loss. 301 redirects will be implemented to fix this.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

## Topics

### TTS Growth Strategy

  - [**Problem:** TTS organic traffic (\~200 clicks/wk) is significantly lower than STT (\~1,000 clicks/wk), raising executive concern.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift content strategy from voice quality to developer-centric topics.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**New Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
          - [TTS evaluation in production](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
          - [TTS latency & concurrency](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
          - [Integrations & API usage](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Competitive Angle:** Target the "builder" (developer) market, where technical specs (latency, concurrency) are critical, rather than competing directly with 11 Labs for the "creator" market.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Continue creating "11 Labs Alternative" content, a proven traffic driver.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
      - [Use Hasan's mind map to accelerate keyword research and content production.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

### January Performance Review

  - [**Overall Growth:** Sessions increased to 2,500, beating the prior month.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [**Top Content Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - [Competitive content (e.g., "11 Labs Alternative"): \~40% of traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
      - ["Voice AI" topic cluster: \~34% of traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:**](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - [Grew to 151 sessions, with ChatGPT at 64%.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
      - ["11 Labs Alternative" article drove 44 sessions with 80% engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**Insight:** LLM traffic is middle-funnel (active evaluation) and has higher engagement but low volume (\~2% of total traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Monitor Gemini, which grew 20% last month and indexes content faster than ChatGPT.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)

### Site Migration Error

  - [**Issue:** A recent migration from `AI apps` to `Voice AI apps` created 410 errors for old URLs instead of using 301 redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [**Impact:** Significant traffic loss from high-value pages, including LensGo (\~400 clicks/day).](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The Sanity team argued 301s to a less relevant page would be a "soft 404" to Google.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Decision:** The team agreed to implement 301 redirects, as a relevant redirect is superior to a dead page for both UX and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Hasan:** Create and share a TTS mind map to guide content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research using the TTS mind map.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [Check capacity to implement 301 redirects for the `AI apps` migration.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
  - [**Troy:**](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [Share the TTS performance report with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [If GrowthX lacks capacity, task Weeplash with implementing the 301 redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/t-iG9v-vtPAxzgJTjxFLbp-veE7yn1SG?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
